prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约12112→11773→10710→9455→17836。2021–2024年呈逐年前移趋势（竞争加剧），但2025年位次大幅后移至17836名， 较2024年后移约8381名，出现明显波动，可能与专业组调整或断档有关。2025年基准位次约17836名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年622人、 2022年679人、2023年677人、2024年668人、2025年664人、2026年656人。2026年较2025年小幅缩招8人（-1.2%），缩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 吉林大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第26名，近年排名稳定在24–27名区间，属国内顶尖综合性大学；2026年高考周期 内声誉评价为“明显负面”，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴筐事件）及学术不端舆情，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制效应，使位次有后移倾向。抖音热度总排名第40位， 评价“较热”，短视频曝光量中等偏上。2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常记录，对报考心理有滞后影响；吉林大学拥有15个A-及以上学科，包括考古学A+、马克思 主义理论A+、化学A、法学A、数学A、机械工程A、物理学A、兽医学A等，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电 气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定。黑龙江省2026年高考总人数约167000人，较2025年（约172114人）略有减少；按近年比例估算，物理类 考生约113894人，较2025年（117407人）减少约3513人，考生规模小幅下降对位次有轻微前移作用。；吉林大学位于吉林省 长春市，与黑龙江省相邻，地域接近性较强，对黑龙江考生有一定吸引力；该校在黑龙江招生规模较大（理科600余人），属该校在省外招生较多的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（-1.2%）、声誉负面舆情可能抑制报考热度、以及物理类考生规模略有下降等因素，预计2026年理科（物理类） 最低录取位次在2025年基准17836名基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约17757名，区间17257–18257名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 12112 → 11773 → 10710 → 9455 → 17836. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving forward year by year (increased competition), but in 2025, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 17836, moving back about 8381 positions compared to 2024, showing obvious fluctuations, possibly related to adjustments in major groups or gaps. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17836; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province: 622 in 2021, 679 in 2022, 677 in 2023, 668 in 2024, 664 in 2025, and 656 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a slight reduction of 8 students (-1.2%), a very small reduction that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 24–27 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving campus safety incidents (the bath basket incident at Qianwei Campus) and academic misconduct public opinion, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology, causing a tendency for rankings to shift backward. Its Douyin heat total ranking is 40th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot,' and short video exposure is moderately high. There were abnormal records of admission cutoffs in 2022–2023, which have a lagging impact on application psychology; Jilin University has 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chemistry A, Law A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong attraction for applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable heat. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province college entrance examination is approximately 167,000, slightly decreasing from about 172,114 in 2025; estimated by recent proportions, physics category candidates are about 113,894, a decrease of about 3,513 from 117,407 in 2025, and the slight decrease in candidate scale has a slight forward-moving effect on rankings. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, adjacent to Heilongjiang Province, with strong regional proximity, which has a certain attraction for Heilongjiang candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Heilongjiang (over 600 in science), making it one of the provinces with more out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of a significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (-1.2%), the negative reputation public opinion that may suppress application heat, and the slight decrease in the number of physics category candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 17836. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17757, with a range of 17257–18257.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), you can focus on reaching for top-tier majors like Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 18000), you should mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors, supplemented by Tier 2 moderate majors. Note the significant fluctuation in rankings in 2025, and it is recommended to comprehensively judge based on the admission rankings of majors in the past 2–3 years.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 954 → 899 → 2864 → 1126 → 1453. In 2023, an anomaly occurred, moving the ranking to 2864 (possibly due to that year), then rebounding to 1126 in 2024, and moving back to 1453 in 2025. In recent years, there has been a backward trend, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 1453. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province: 72 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 65 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 80 in 2025, and 83 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 3 students (+3.75%), a slight expansion that eases competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is a top-tier comprehensive university in China with equally outstanding liberal arts strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct controversies, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology, causing a backward trend in rankings. Douyin popularity ranks 40th overall, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot'; Jilin University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines are prominent: Law (A), Archaeology (A+), Marxist Theory (A+), Philosophy (A-), Political Science (A-), Business Administration (A-), etc., which strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a high social popularity recommendation (relatively hot), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province college entrance examination is approximately 167,000, with an estimated 53,106 history category candidates based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 1,601 from 2025 (54,707), a slight decline in candidate scale that has a minor forward-moving effect on rankings. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, adjacent to Heilongjiang Province, naturally attracting candidates from Heilongjiang due to geographical proximity. The university enrolls about 80 liberal arts students in Heilongjiang, making it one of the comprehensive universities with a relatively large out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+3.75%), the potential suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation incidents, and the slight decrease in the number of history category candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will slightly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 1453. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1516, with a range of 1364–1668.
